data.title: Macy's Lowers Annual Profit Forecast Amid Accounting Misstep, Stock Tumbles
data.description: Macy's Q3 results reveal sales of $4.74 billion, a 2.4% decline in net sales, and guidance adjustments following an accounting investigation.

data.title: This D.R. Horton Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Wednesday
Tesla's China Sales Recover, Model Y Accounts for Over 60% of November Sales
data.description: Tesla's sales performance in China recovers, with Model Y leading the charge, as the company sees solid growth despite competition from BYD and others.

data.title: European Biotech Pharming Group Touts Positive Data From Pivotal Pediatric Study Of FDA-Approved Immune System Disorder Drug
data.description: Pharming's Phase 3 trial results for leniolisib in children with APDS demonstrate efficacy and safety, supporting future regulatory filings in 2025.
